rationale: The ensures is `LHS ==> det_eq`, so individual LHS conjuncts only hold under the LHS hypothesis; the previous attempt asserted them at top level, where they failed. Wrap every conjunct-surfacing assert inside an `if (LHS) { ... }` block so Verus has LHS as a ground hypothesis (the !LHS branch makes the implication vacuous), and add the cross-run alignments (shared end-point, ok-bits, and history shapes when discriminators agree) that z3 needs to make progress on the determinism postcondition.
